name: Durable
description: Durable — AI website builder that generates a complete small business website from a short text description in seconds.

seo.title: Durable — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Durable: Durable — AI website builder that generates a complete small business website from a short text description in seconds.

when_to_use: Generating complete business websites in seconds via AI
Launching SMB landing pages without a web developer
Automating website creation at scale for franchise networks

pros: Generates full small-biz sites in seconds
cons: SEO control weaker than Webflow or WP
Lock-in if you want to migrate later
review.verdict: Easy win for solo service businesses; developers and agencies should avoid.
review.best_for: Plumbers, stylists, and local service SMBs needing a site fast
review.not_for: Design-led brands or developers wanting granular control

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
